basic_details.job_title: District Subordinate Court Madurai Law Officers Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 31 Posts

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Advocate with not less than seven years / ten years' standing at the Bar
qualification.details: Advocate with not less than seven years / ten years' standing at the Bar.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Special Public Prosecutor-I (Scheduled Castes & Scheduled Tribes)
Additional Government Pleader, cum Additional Public Prosecutor

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

selection_process: Expression of willingness in writing Panel of names
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: madurai.nic.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download District Subordinate Court Madurai Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Law Officers posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Law Officers posts is 29th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced?
faq.answer: A total of 31 vacancies have been announced for the Law Officers posts by the District Subordinate Court Madurai.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required qualification for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must be Advocates with not less than seven years or ten years of standing at the Bar to be eligible for these Law Officer positions.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The Law Officers posts are on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q7. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by the District Subordinate Court Madurai.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number is Roc.No.C4/e-4593516/2026.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location?
faq.answer: The job location is Madurai, Tamil Nadu.

faq.question: Q10. What are the different types of Law Officer posts available?
faq.answer: The available posts include Public Prosecutor, Government Pleader, Additional Public Prosecutor, Special Public Prosecutor (various categories), and Pleader doing Government Work.
